channel.title: MicroStudio engineering notes
channel.description: Practical, evidence-led notes about narrow technical controls, built with synthetic or public information and explicit scope boundaries.

item.title: Amazon Settlement V2: five controls before the file changes.
item.description: A practical control note for Amazon's 2026 Settlement V2 migration: field mapping, settlement totals, amount breakdowns, timing checks and deterministic exception evidence.

item.title: A webhook needs three records, not one success log.
item.description: A runnable, synthetic Node.js proof for signed webhook ingestion, idempotent replay handling, visible exceptions and transactional side effects.

item.title: Webhook 返回 200，为什么仍可能重复下单？
item.description: 用可运行的合成 Node.js 证明解释 Webhook 原始报文验签、数据库幂等、异常队列、事务型 outbox 与逐次对账。
